title: EndpointType missing Display impl inconsistent with other enums
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/types.rs — EndpointType (lines 138-200) is the only string enum in the file without an impl std::fmt::Display. All five other enums in the same pattern (ChatMemberRole, ChatKind, BodyType, OwnerPresence, PushUrgency) implement Display via f.write_str(self.as_str()). EndpointType uses as_uri() instead of as_str(), but that is not a reason to omit Display; callers who want fmt formatting get a compiler gap. Add impl std::fmt::Display for EndpointType delegating to self.as_uri().
